name: DeepSeek

when_to_use: Running state-of-the-art open reasoning models locally or via API

cons: Context length and tooling evolve rapidly
review.verdict: The best price-to-performance LLM in 2026 if you can accept Chinese-lab provenance.

review.not_for: Regulated industries barred from Chinese-origin model providers
